title: Hyperbranched dielectric polymer networks exhibiting giant energy storage density at 250 °C
abstract: Published online: 27 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-74830-2 To overcome charge transfer and achieve efficient capacitive energy storage in dielectric polymers at thermal extremes, hyperbranched networks are designed to expand inter-chain spacing and suppress secondary relaxation, delivering 4.9 J/cm³ <mark>energy density</mark> with 90% efficiency at 250 °C.
